---
title: "Editing Fields"
---

To edit a field:

1.  From the Hyland Experience Capture Administration user interface, click the Fields tab.
2.  Select the field to be edited.
-
To filter the list of fields displayed, enter in the Search field a string of characters contained in the name of the field you want to select.

-
To change how the list is organized, select the appropriate option from the Sort By drop-down list.

The configurable options for the field are displayed.

![](data:image/gif;base64,)
3.  Edit the Display Name for the field.  Note: After a field is created and saved, you cannot modify its Data Type.
4.  The Formatting list displays the format of the field.
5.  To assign a list to this field, select the Assign list values check box.
6.  Select a list from the Available lists drop-down list.
7.  Click Save.
